text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 
19 
md_sptime: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD spend enough time with you 
SAS Format: OFA 
1: NEVER 
2: SOMETIMES 
3: USUALLY 
4: ALWAYS 
md_talkmeds: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD talk about all Rx medicines 
SAS Format: OFA 
1: NEVER 
2: SOMETIMES 
3: USUALLY 
4: ALWAYS 
md_test: RECODE : Last 6 mths, personal MD ordered blood test/x-ray/other 
SAS Format: YNA 
1: YES 
2: NO 
md_testasan: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often got test results
